stemHtml: CS 25.121 (d)(1) paragraphs (i) to (iv) states the pre-requisite conditions for an aeroplane, during certification, demonstrating its one-engine-inoperative gradient of climb in the approach phase. Which of the following options states the correct description of ONE of these prerequisites?

options.a: The climb speed is established in connection with normal landing procedures but not more than the stall speed.
options.b: The critical engine is inoperative with the remaining engines at the flexible or assumed temperature power or thrust setting.
options.d: The aeroplane is at its expected landing weight.
